description: 172→9 failures: Buffer, SubtleCrypto, MessageChannel, Compression, Navigator.locks, Beam API, Worker, Promise.race, streams fixes

asi.remaining: 2 tests need inter-process GenServer features: Beam.monitor callback firing, cross-runtime lock blocking. These require the NIF GenServer runtime, not single-process BEAM mode.
